name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES state

(* State can be idle, trying, or critical *)
Init == /\ state \in [1..N -> {"idle", "trying", "critical"}]
        /\ \A i \in 1..N : state[i] = "idle"

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "critical"]
          /\ state[i] = "trying"
          /\ \A j \in 1..N : j # i => state[j] # "critical"

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_state

====

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N, participants
VARIABLES coordinator, participantStates


vars == << coordinator, participantStates >>

Init == /\ coordinator = "INIT"
      /\ participantStates = [p \in participants |-> "IDLE"]

Prepare == /\ coordinator = "INIT"
          /\ coordinator' = "PREPARE"
          /\ UNCHANGED participantStates

VoteYes == /\ coordinator = "PREPARE"
           /\ \A p \in participants: participantStates[p] = "IDLE"
           /\ coordinator' = "VOTE_YES"
           /\ participantStates' = [participantStates EXCEPT ![p] = "VOTED_YES"]
           /\ UNCHANGED <<>>

VoteNo == /\ coordinator = "PREPARE"
          /\ \A p \in participants: participantStates[p] = "IDLE"
          /\ coordinator' = "VOTE_NO"
          /\ participantStates' = [participantStates EXCEPT ![p] = "VOTED_NO"]
          /\ UNCHANGED <<>>

Commit == /\ coordinator = "VOTE_YES"
          /\ \A p \in participants: participantStates[p] = "VOTED_YES"
          /\ coordinator' = "COMMIT"
          /\ participantStates' = [participantStates EXCEPT ![p] = "COMMITTED"]
          /\ UNCHANGED <<>>

Abort == /\ coordinator = "VOTE_NO"
          /\ \A p \in participants: participantStates[p] = "VOTED_NO"
          /\ coordinator' = "ABORT"
          /\ participantStates' = [participantStates EXCEPT ![p] = "ABORTED"]
          /\ UNCHANGED <<>>

Next == Prepare \/ VoteYes \/ VoteNo \/ Commit \/ Abort

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == /\ coordinator \in {"INIT", "PREPARE", "VOTE_YES", "VOTE_NO", "COMMIT", "ABORT"}
         /\ \A p \in participants: participantStates[p] \in {"IDLE", "VOTED_YES", "VOTED_NO", "COMMITTED", "ABORTED"}

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Forks: forks[i] = TRUE if fork i is available, FALSE if held *)
(* States: states[i] = "thinking", "hungry", or "eating" *)

Init == /\ forks = [i \in 0..N-1 |-> TRUE]
        /\ states = [i \in 0..N-1 |-> "thinking"]

Next == 
    \E i \in 0..N-1 :
        \/ (* Philosopher i starts eating *)
            /\ states[i] = "hungry"
            /\ forks[i] = TRUE
            /\ forks[(i+1) % N] = TRUE
            /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE, ![(i+1) % N] = FALSE]
            /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
        \/ (* Philosopher i stops eating *)
            /\ states[i] = "eating"
            /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE, ![(i+1) % N] = TRUE]
            /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]
        \/ (* Philosopher i becomes hungry *)
            /\ states[i] = "thinking"
            /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
        \/ (* No change *)
            /\ forks' = forks
            /\ states' = states

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

====

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANT N

VARIABLES num, flag

vars == <<num, flag>>

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
          /\ LET maxNum == Max(Seq(num))
                newNum == IF maxNum = 0 THEN 1 ELSE maxNum + 1
            IN /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = newNum]
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

====

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES queue, head, tail, count

vars == <<queue, head, tail, count>>

Init == /\ queue = [i \in 1..K |-> 0]
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1
        /\ count = 0

TypeOK == /\ head \in 1..K
          /\ tail \in 1..K
          /\ count \in 0..K
          /\ queue \in [1..K -> Nat]

ProducerAction == /\ count < K
                 /\ queue[tail] = 0
                 /\ queue' = [queue EXCEPT ![tail] = 1]
                 /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
                 /\ count' = count + 1
                 /\ head' = head

ConsumerAction == /\ count > 0
                 /\ queue[head] = 1
                 /\ queue' = [queue EXCEPT ![head] = 0]
                 /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
                 /\ count' = count - 1
                 /\ tail' = tail

Next == ProducerAction \/ ConsumerAction

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS NULL, ServerSet

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

(* State can be "Follower", "Candidate", or "Leader" *)

Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
        /\ votedFor = [s \in ServerSet |-> NULL]
        /\ state = [s \in ServerSet |-> "Follower"]

Next == \/ (* Follower transitions *)
           /\ state[s] = "Follower"
           /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
           /\ votedFor' = votedFor
           /\ state' = state
       \/ (* Candidate transitions *)
           /\ state[s] = "Candidate"
           /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
           /\ votedFor' = [votedFor EXCEPT ![s] = s]
           /\ state' = state
       \/ (* Leader transitions *)
           /\ state[s] = "Leader"
           /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
           /\ votedFor' = votedFor
           /\ state' = state

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

====

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = 0
       /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ readers' = readers + 1
          /\ writer_active' = writer_active
       \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ readers' = readers - 1
          /\ writer_active' = writer_active
       \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ readers' = readers
          /\ writer_active' = TRUE
       \/ /\ writer_active = TRUE
          /\ readers' = readers
          /\ writer_active' = FALSE

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

====

name: Distributed Snapshot (Chandy-Lamport)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DistributedSnapshot ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES N, states, channels, snapshot, recorded, markers

Init == /\ N \in Nat
        /\ N > 0
        /\ states \in [1..N -> [value: Int]]
        /\ channels \in [1..N -> [1..N -> Seq(Int)]]
        /\ snapshot \in [1..N -> [value: Int]]
        /\ recorded \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]
        /\ markers \in [1..N -> [1..N -> BOOLEAN]]
        /\ \A i \in 1..N: /\ states[i] = [value |-> 0]
                           /\ channels[i] = [j \in 1..N |-> <<>>]
                           /\ snapshot[i] = [value |-> 0]
                           /\ recorded[i] = FALSE
                           /\ markers[i] = [j \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

SendMarker(i, j) == /\ markers[i][j] = FALSE
                    /\ markers[i][j] := TRUE
                    /\ channels[i][j] = Append(channels[i][j], "marker")

ReceiveMarker(i, j) == /\ markers[i][j] = TRUE
                      /\ markers[i][j] := FALSE
                      /\ channels[i][j] = Tail(channels[i][j])

RecordState(i) == /\ recorded[i] = FALSE
                 /\ recorded[i] := TRUE
                 /\ snapshot[i] = states[i]
                 /\ \A j \in 1..N: /\ markers[i][j] = FALSE
                                   /\ markers[i][j] := TRUE
                                   /\ channels[i][j] = Append(channels[i][j], "marker")

Next == \E i, j \in 1..N:
          \/ /\ markers[i][j] = FALSE
             /\ channels[i][j] = Append(channels[i][j], states[i][j])
          \/ /\ markers[i][j] = TRUE
             /\ ReceiveMarker(i, j)
          \/ /\ recorded[i] = FALSE
             /\ RecordState(i)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<N, states, channels, snapshot, recorded, markers>>

TypeOK == /\ N \in Nat
          /\ N > 0
          /\ states \in [1..N -> [value: Int]]
          /\ channels \in [1..N -> [1..N -> Seq(Int)]]
          /\ snapshot \in [1..N -> [value: Int]]
          /\ recorded \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]
          /\ markers \in [1..N -> [1..N -> BOOLEAN]]
          /\ \A i \in 1..N: /\ states[i] = [value |-> 0]
                           /\ channels[i] = [j \in 1..N |-> <<>>]
                           /\ snapshot[i] = [value |-> 0]
                           /\ recorded[i] = FALSE
                           /\ markers[i] = [j \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES token, message

Init == /\ token \in 1..N
        /\ message \in {"", "msg"}

Next == /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1
        /\ message' \in {"", "msg"}

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token, message>>

====

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS NULL

VARIABLES store

Keys == {"k1", "k2", "k3"}
Values == {"v1", "v2", "v3"}

Init == store = [k \in Keys |-> NULL]

Next == \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values :
          /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
          /\ UNCHANGED <<>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

====

name: Paxos Single-Decree
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Paxos ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANTS N, M, V

VARIABLES acceptors, proposers, chosen, accepted, ballot, promised, value

vars == <<acceptors, proposers, chosen>>

Init == 
    /\ acceptors = [i \in 1..N |-> [promised |-> 0, accepted |-> <<0, 0>>]]
    /\ proposers = [i \in 1..M |-> [ballot |-> 0, value |-> 0]]
    /\ chosen = 0

Next == 
    /\ \E i \in 1..M : 
        /\ proposers[i].ballot' = proposers[i].ballot + 1
        /\ proposers[i].value' = proposers[i].value
        /\ \E j \in 1..N : 
            /\ acceptors[j].promised' = Max(acceptors[j].promised, proposers[i].ballot')
            /\ acceptors[j].accepted' = acceptors[j].accepted
        /\ chosen' = chosen
    \/ \E i \in 1..N : 
        /\ acceptors[i].promised' = acceptors[i].promised
        /\ acceptors[i].accepted' = <<acceptors[i].promised, proposers[i].value>>
        /\ chosen' = chosen
    \/ chosen' = chosen

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

====

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileSender ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS FileSize, ChunkSize, MaxRetries
VARIABLES state, chunkIndex, retransmitCount, sentChunks

Init == /\ state = "idle"
        /\ chunkIndex = 0
        /\ retransmitCount = 0
        /\ sentChunks = {}

SendChunk == /\ state = "idle"
            /\ chunkIndex < FileSize
            /\ state' = "sending"
            /\ chunkIndex' = chunkIndex
            /\ retransmitCount' = 0
            /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks

Transmit == /\ state = "sending"
           /\ state' = "waiting"
           /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount + 1
           /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks

ReceiveAck == /\ state = "waiting"
             /\ state' = "idle"
             /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks \cup {chunkIndex}
             /\ retransmitCount' = 0

GiveUp == /\ state = "waiting"
          /\ retransmitCount >= MaxRetries
          /\ state' = "error"
          /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks

Done == /\ state = "idle"
        /\ chunkIndex = FileSize
        /\ state' = "done"
        /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks

Next == \/ SendChunk
       \/ Transmit
       \/ ReceiveAck
       \/ GiveUp
       \/ Done

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, chunkIndex, retransmitCount, sentChunks>>
====
